_comment: Shipped preset for Ideogram 4.0 text-to-image. Outer graph is a single subgraph instance #98 → SaveImage #158. After graphToPrompt expands the subgraph, inner nodes use composite ids '98:<inner>'. We bind: '98:24' CLIPTextEncode.text ← main_prompt, '98:27'/'98:28' PrimitiveInt.value ← computed:width/height, '98:18' RandomNoise.noise_seed ← option:seed (random_int31).
label: Image Ideogram4 T2I
description: Ideogram 4.0 text-to-image (fp8 quantized). Highly stylised typography-aware model. Prompt the scene + style; the workflow handles its own ckpt / clip / vae file selection.
